final:
module portfolio_opt (
    input [4:0] weight1, 
    input [4:0] weight2, 
    input [4:0] weight3, 
    input [4:0] return1, 
    input [4:0] return2, 
    input [4:0] return3, 
    output reg [9:0] expected_return
);
    always @(*) begin
        expected_return = (weight1 * return1 + weight2 * return2 + weight3 * return3);
    end
  always @(*) begin
    if (1'b0) begin
      expected_return <= 10'd0;
    end
  end

endmodule
